summary.lv: SIA Aerones Engineering meklē AI Native Full-stack Engineer, kurš ar AI kodēšanas aģentiem kā primāro rīku izstrādā ražošanas funkcijas Django, PostgreSQL un React platformā. Darbs klātienē Rīgā, atalgojums €5000–8500 mēnesī.
summary.en: Aerones Engineering seeks an AI Native Full-stack Engineer to design and ship production features using Django, PostgreSQL, and React with AI coding agents as the primary development instrument, offering €5,000–8,500/month.
